Meta.title: Free URL & Address QR Code Generator | Online QR Maker
Meta.description: Turn URLs and web addresses into QR codes for free. Create link QR codes with transparent backgrounds, custom styles, and instant PNG, JPEG, WebP, or SVG download—no sign-up required.

QrWorkspace.title: Free URL QR Code Generator
QrWorkspace.description: Enter a URL below to preview your QR code. Download it for free!
QrWorkspace.emptyHint: Enter content below to show the preview QR.

QrDownloadBar.jpegNoTransparency: JPEG does not support transparent backgrounds.

BackgroundPanel.transparentHint: When on, the background is transparent. When off, the solid color below is used.
BackgroundPanel.jpegNoTransparency: JPEG does not support transparent backgrounds. Transparent mode is turned off while JPEG is selected.

QrScanHint.title: Scanning tip
QrScanHint.body: A large center image can cover data modules and make scanning fail.

Footer.disclaimer: This service encodes what you enter into a QR code. You are responsible for how you use the generated QR code and the outcome.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.description: This policy explains how we handle information when you use the service.

collect.title: Information we collect
items: The service does not require sign-up and does not intentionally collect sensitive personal data.
Your input (URL/text) is used only to generate the QR code and is not stored by us (processed in the browser).
Basic access logs and device information (e.g., IP, User-Agent) may be collected by hosting/analytics providers for security and reliability.

purpose.title: How we use information
items: Provide QR code generation
Improve stability/security and prevent abuse

storage.title: Retention
storage.body: We do not store your input content. Operational logs may be retained for a limited time and then deleted.

thirdParty.title: Third-party services
thirdParty.body: We may use third-party hosting/CDN services to operate the site. We do not sell or share your input content with third parties.

cookies.title: Cookies and ads
cookies.body: Cookies may be used to improve experience or serve ads. You can control cookies in your browser settings.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.body: If you have questions or requests regarding personal data, contact us using the method below.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: Please reach out via the email on the Contact page.

Terms.title: Terms of Service
Terms.description: These terms govern your use of the service.

acceptance.title: Acceptance
acceptance.body: By using the service, you agree to these terms.

service.title: Service
items: We provide QR code generation and download features for URLs/text.
We may change or discontinue features without notice.
Maintenance may occur to improve performance and reliability.

user.title: User responsibilities
items: Do not use the service for illegal content, malware, or harmful links.
Do not abuse the service with excessive automated requests or attacks.

ip.title: Intellectual property
ip.body: The service UI and code are owned by the service provider. You may use the service for personal or legitimate business purposes within these terms.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.body: The service is provided “as is”. We are not liable for outcomes such as scan failures or incorrect URLs.

changes.title: Changes to terms
changes.body: We may update these terms and will provide notice by posting updates on the site.

About.title: About
About.description: A simple tool to turn a URL or text into a QR code and download it in multiple formats for free.

what.title: What is this?
what.body: Paste a URL or enter text to generate a QR code instantly and download it.

features.title: Key features
items: Download as PNG/JPEG/WebP/SVG
Customize colors, corners, background, and logo
Fast, no sign-up required

data.title: Data handling
data.body: Your input is used only for generation. Avoid entering sensitive personal information.

notice.title: Tips
notice.body: If scanning fails, reduce logo size, increase contrast, and leave enough margin.

Contact.title: Contact
Contact.description: For questions, partnerships, or bug reports, contact us by email.

scope.title: What you can contact us about
items: Bug reports
Feature requests
Policy/copyright inquiries

links.title: Related
items: Privacy Policy
Terms
FAQ

q1.title: How do I convert a URL to a QR code?
q1.body: Paste your URL into the input field on the home page. A preview updates automatically—choose a format and download.

q2.title: Which formats support a transparent background?
q2.body: PNG/WebP/SVG can be transparent. JPEG doesn’t support transparency, so it’s turned off automatically.

q3.title: Scanning doesn’t work well.
q3.body: Reduce the center logo size, increase contrast between modules and background, and keep enough margin.

q4.title: Do you store my input URL/text?
q4.body: We don’t store your input content. Minimal access logs may exist for security and reliability.

q5.title: Can I use the generated QR codes commercially?
q5.body: Yes, you can use them at your own responsibility. Illegal or abusive use is not allowed.

Guide.title: URL to QR Guide
Guide.description: How to make an address (URL) QR code and choose the best format.

how.title: How to turn a URL into a QR code
steps: Paste your URL (web address) into the input on the home page.
Check that the preview QR code is generated automatically.
Click Download to save the file.

format.title: Format tips
items: PNG: Most common and supports transparency.
SVG: Vector format—great for printing and scaling.
WebP: Smaller files and supports transparency (compatibility may vary).
JPEG: Does not support transparency.

tips.title: Improve scan reliability
items: Increase contrast between modules and background.
Keep the center logo small.
Leave enough margin (quiet zone).

safe.title: Safe use
safe.body: Use trustworthy domains and double-check links to avoid being mistaken for phishing or malicious URLs.

next.title: Need help?
next.body: If scanning fails or print quality looks off, check the FAQ or contact us.
